scenario_contradiction.threshold: contradiction retained cautious; no explicit fact

scenario_detected_lie.threshold: reliability drop >= 0.05 and contradiction value retained

scenario_long_silence.threshold: after 100 turns reliability within 0.15 of prior mean

scenario_roleplay_isolation.threshold: roleplay causes zero factual reliability movement and no long-term promotion
